title: Heartbeat scan — persona model routing and clunger personas

log.context: Heartbeat scan — persona model routing and clunger personas

Scan complete. Here's what was found:

**Model routing works correctly overall.** The `callLlm` function in `/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts` handles all expected model types: grok (via xai proxy at `:4100`), gemini (via CLI), and claude (via CLI). No silent fallbacks — unknown models throw explicitly.

**One real issue — GitHub issue #134 opened:**
- `bloodfeast` is the only `eligible` persona with a grok model (`grok-4.20-0309-reasoning`)
